pr-evidence/ci-console-script-entrypoint.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review approved with no findings; reviewer also reran the console-script probe and confirmed verified_console_scripts=28.
verification: poetry install -E test plus console-script probe -> verified_console_scripts=28
poetry run pytest tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q -> 37 passed
poetry build -> built sdist and wheel
what_changed: Added a CI gate that reads [project.scripts] from pyproject.toml and runs --help on each installed console script after Poetry install.
Updated GitHub workflow documentation and governance tests to require the installed entry-point check.
pr-evidence/ci-console-script-entrypoint.why: The package goal requires an intuitive installed CLI/API surface; this prevents stale or broken console script metadata from passing CI.
